input.video_title: The Pomodoro Technique Is Broken — Here's What Works Better
input.summary: The video explains why the standard 25-minute Pomodoro intervals don't work for deep creative work. It introduces a modified flow-state timer system that uses 52-minute work blocks with 17-minute breaks, based on productivity research. Includes a walkthrough of how to set this up with free tools and a comparison of results over 30 days.

input.video_title: How to Repot a Houseplant Without Killing It
input.summary: Step-by-step guide to repotting common houseplants. Covers when to repot, choosing the right pot size, soil mix basics, and the most common mistake beginners make (potting too deep). Shows the process with three different plants.

label: European context — public transport travel video

input.video_title: How to Travel Europe by Train for Half the Price
input.summary: A complete guide to budget European train travel. Covers Interrail and Eurail pass strategies, when night trains save money versus budget airlines, booking tips for Deutsche Bahn, SNCF, and Trenitalia, and a real itinerary that visited 6 countries in 14 days for under 400 EUR in transport costs. Includes a comparison of seat61.com strategies versus standard booking.
input.target_audience: Budget travelers planning a European trip, primarily English-speaking, 20-35
